channel.title: Cloud on Apoorva Sharma
channel.description: Recent content in Cloud on Apoorva Sharma

item.title: What I Learned Deploying on Azure for the First Time
item.description: Notes from my first production deployment on Azure — what surprised me, what tripped me up, and what I would do differently.

item.title: Infrastructure as Code: First Principles
item.description: Why IaC is not just about automation, and the principles that make it actually work.
